name: m9s-sale-payment-gateway

metadata.name: m9s-sale-payment-gateway
classifiers: Intended Audience :: Financial and Insurance Industry
License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 or later (GPLv3+)

documentation:
[![Tests Status](https://m9s.gitlab.io/sale_payment_gateway/junit/junit-badge.svg)](https://m9s.gitlab.io/sale_payment_gateway)

[![Coverage Status](https://m9s.gitlab.io/sale_payment_gateway/coverage/coverage-badge.svg)](https://m9s.gitlab.io/sale_payment_gateway)

This module runs with the Tryton application platform.

Installing
----------

See INSTALL

Note
----

This module is developed and tested over a patched Tryton server and
core modules. Maybe some of these patches are required for the module to work.

Support
-------

For more information or if you encounter any problems with this module,
please contact the programmers at

#### MBSolutions

   * Issues:   https://gitlab.com/m9s/sale_payment_gateway/issues
   * Website:  http://www.m9s.biz/
   * Email:    info@m9s.biz

If you encounter any problems with Tryton, please don't hesitate to ask
questions on the Tryton bug tracker, forum or IRC channel:

   * http://bugs.tryton.org/
   * http://www.tryton.org/forum
   * irc://irc.freenode.net/tryton

License
-------

See LICENSE

Copyright
---------

See COPYRIGHT

documentation: Searcher for field delivery_date

documentation: Getter method for fetching amounts.

documentation: Cancel all payment transactions related to payment

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.payment.Payment._create_payment_transaction
documentation: Creates an active record for gateway transaction.

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.payment.Payment.authorize
documentation: Authorize all the transactions associated with the payment.

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.payment.Payment.capture
documentation: Captures the given amount from this transaction

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.payment.Payment.delete
documentation: Delete a payment only if there is no amount consumed

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.payment.Payment.on_change_with_description
documentation:
Return a short description of the sale payment
This can be used in documents to show payment details

modules.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale
documentation: The COPYRIGHT file at the top level of this repository contains
the full copyright notices and license terms.

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale.get_authorize_options
documentation: Return all the options from sale configuration.

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale.get_capture_options
documentation: Return all the options from sale configuration.

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale.get_payment_method_priority
documentation:
Priority order for payment methods. Downstream modules can override
this method to change the method priority.

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale.get_payment
documentation: Return amount from payments.

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale.get_sorted_payments
documentation: Return the payments in the order they should be consumed

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale.check_total_payment
documentation: Check the amount to pay against the total amount of payments.

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale.authorize_payments
documentation:
Authorize sale payments. It actually creates payment transactions
corresponding to sale payments and set the payment processing state to
`waiting to auth`.

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale.capture_payments
documentation:
Capture sale payments.

* If existing authorizations exist, capture them
* If not, capture available payments directly

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale.auth_capture
documentation:
A button triggered version of authorizing or capturing payment directly
from an order.

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale.handle_pos_payments
documentation: Add compatibility with the sale_payment_channel module

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale.settle_manual_payments
documentation:
Manual payments should be settled when the order is processed. This is
separated into a different method so downstream modules can change this
behavior to adapt to different workflows

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale._get_amount_to_checkout
documentation:
Returns the amount which needs to be paid

Downstream modules can override this method to change it as
per their requirement

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale._pay_using_credit_card
documentation:
Complete using the given credit card and finish the transaction.
\:param gateway: Active record of the payment gateway to process card
\:param credit_card: A dictionary with either of the following

> information sets:
> \* owner: name of the owner (unicode)
> \* number: number of the credit card
> \* expiry_month: expiry month (int or string)
> \* expiry_year: year as string
> \* cvv: the cvv number
> In future this method will accept track1 and track2
> as valid information.

```
param amount

Decimal amount to charge the card for
```

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale._pay_using_profile
documentation:
Complete the Checkout using a payment_profile. Only available to the
registered users of the website.
\:param payment_profile: Active record of payment profile
\:param amount: Decimal amount to charge the card for

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale.process_pending_payments
documentation: Process waiting payments for corresponding sale.

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale.process_all_pending_payments
documentation: Cron method authorizes waiting payments.

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.Sale.copy
documentation: Duplicating records

classes.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.AddSalePaymentView

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.AddSalePaymentView.get_method
documentation: Return the method based on the gateway

methods.name: trytond.modules.sale_payment_gateway.sale.AddSalePaymentView.on_change_gateway
documentation: @fields.depends('party')
def on_change_party(self):
if self.party and self.party.payment_profiles:
if len(self.party.payment_profiles) == 1:
self.payment_profile = self.party.payment_profiles[0]
self.use_existing_card = True
else:
self.payment_profile = None
self.use_existing_card = False
View for adding Sale Payments

Ends the wizard

Override to append further processing (e.g. card data)
